layout_pg_en: fixed school interior corridor: continuous metal lockers on right wall, evenly spaced classroom doors with frosted glass panels on left, long one-point perspective to distant stairwell glow, pale linoleum with scuff marks, cool fluorescent ceiling strips with occasional dead tube — same door rhythm, ceiling height and wall color every shot

venue.narrative_tone: 过渡与曝光：擦肩、叫住、递纸条、刻意压低声音。路人、同事或学生一句带过即可抬高「被看见」的张力；不宜写成长时间无人经过的真空走廊甜宠。

world_card_summary: 人来人往的过渡带：一句话、一眼神都要算好音量与距离。
